consider the delfruit ratings as a very vague idea of what to expect
its not objectively 71 for a lot of reasons
but most of the game is around that range
delfruit ratings can be funny because we are like the only community where the difficulty scale just caps off at some point
but people have gotten much better throughout the years
so older games will be rated higher than newer games difficulty wise
ppl have different interpretations of what Advanced or Intermediate could mean, and obv that comes through in the delfruit ratings too
so its a bit of a tossup whether theyre correct or not
it being because of a cap is funny cause like, our scale is 100 numbers its still larger than any other communitys scale
if you rlly wanna know how hard a game is you should look at like one person's ratings and see like what it is relative to stuff they've beaten
even between person to person difficulty itself will vary a lot, its impossible to make it a single unified perception of difficulty
i wish we would use something that made more sense and i have like tried but realistically it'll never catch on because delfruit
dont worry, delfruit 2 is right around the corner!!
I could always change the system the problem is theres so many old ratings and thats like what it relies on mostly for games
like 99% of reviews and shit are over a year old
yeah it sucks to have to impose a completely new system
it shouldnt rewrite the database thats already there
yea, despite the flaws it's what people are used to
if something like the tier system i came up with was implemented it should def be supplementary
doing anything that would change old reviews basically destroys most the database and games would just be mostly N/A
definitely wouldnt mind a tier system and then just add new upper tiers if needed
Imagine, fangame awards, and you see a trailer, for Hyper Demon tier...
(youll have to straight up pay me money to name anything on delfruit Demon)
like imagine if in lr2ir or some shit, difficulty was gauged by an average of the reviews of that specific chart
instead of just saying oh yeah thats sp8 bro ofc

my thought would just be numbers yeah, like CEDBs website
yeah i wish it was more like that tbh
the real problem for games having inconsistent difficulty though is just, the system is based on the average of the ratings given
@Skulldude_ mocha ir (most popular beatoraja ir) actually has a thing where people just choose the level for stuff called level review
so uh, system doesnt work when like 3 people rate games
I think any issue on delfruit would be solved just by having more people rate stuff so the average is actually relevant
thats the thing right, if its an already established system you don't need one thats far more subjective
but if u started out with the nebulous ratings and have rolled with it for almost 15 years, Oops!!
